creator: strongswan@Nanoteq.com
text:
(In reply to Renato Botelho from comment #5)
This was done to resolve the following warning from stage-qa

====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Error: /usr/local/lib/ipsec/plugins/libstrongswan-unbound.so is linked to /usr/local/lib/libldns.so.1 from dns/ldns but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need LIB_DEPENDS+=libldns.so:dns/ldns
